scripts.serve: npm run build && firebase emulators:start --only functions
scripts.test:core: rm -rf test-lib && tsc --ignoreConfig --target ES2022 --module CommonJS --moduleResolution Node --types node --ignoreDeprecations 6.0 --esModuleInterop --skipLibCheck --outDir test-lib src/case-id.ts src/shift-import-types.ts src/shift-parser.ts test/shift-import-core.test.ts && node test-lib/test/shift-import-core.test.js
scripts.test:staff: rm -rf test-staff-lib && tsc --ignoreConfig --target ES2022 --module CommonJS --moduleResolution Node --types node --ignoreDeprecations 6.0 --esModuleInterop --skipLibCheck --outDir test-staff-lib src/case-id.ts src/staff-identity.ts src/staff-import-types.ts src/staff-parser.ts test/staff-import-core.test.ts && node test-staff-lib/test/staff-import-core.test.js
scripts.test:all-core: npm run test:core && npm run test:staff && npm run test:notifications && npm run test:tasks && npm run test:sheet-write && npm run test:admin-ops && npm run test:analytics && npm run test:job-management && npm run test:row-creation && npm run test:setup-wizard && npm run test:month-sheet && npm run test:gas-audit && npm run test:first-write-gate && npm run test:gas-secret-scan && npm run test:gas-remediation && npm run test:gas-patch && npm run test:gas-regression && npm run test:release-artifact && npm run test:pilot-rollout && npm run test:pilot-expansion && npm run test:staged-rollout && npm run test:production-release && npm run test:production-rehearsal && npm run test:production-approval-package && npm run test:production-cutover && npm run test:production-slo && npm run test:production-telemetry && npm run test:production-metric && npm run test:production-deployment-readiness && npm run test:production-evidence && npm run test:production-evidence-monitor && npm run test:recovery
scripts.test:release: npm run test:all-core && npm run test:tenant-core && npm run test:tenant-isolation && npm run test:tenant-branding && npm run test:tenant-backup && npm run test:billing-core && npm run test:webhook-core && npm run test:invoice-core && npm run test:v19-core && npm run test:release-gate && npm run test:environment-config && npm run test:final-retention
scripts.test:notifications: rm -rf test-notification-lib && tsc --ignoreConfig --target ES2022 --module CommonJS --moduleResolution Node --types node --ignoreDeprecations 6.0 --esModuleInterop --skipLibCheck --outDir test-notification-lib src/notification-time.ts test/notification-time.test.ts && node test-notification-lib/test/notification-time.test.js
scripts.test:tasks: rm -rf test-task-lib && tsc --ignoreConfig --target ES2022 --module CommonJS --moduleResolution Node --types node --ignoreDeprecations 6.0 --esModuleInterop --skipLibCheck --outDir test-task-lib src/notification-time.ts src/task-core.ts test/task-core.test.ts && node test-task-lib/test/task-core.test.js
scripts.test:sheet-write: rm -rf test-sheet-write-lib && tsc --ignoreConfig --target ES2022 --module CommonJS --moduleResolution Node --types node --ignoreDeprecations 6.0 --esModuleInterop --skipLibCheck --outDir test-sheet-write-lib src/sheet-write-core.ts test/sheet-write-core.test.ts && node test-sheet-write-lib/test/sheet-write-core.test.js
scripts.test:admin-ops: rm -rf test-admin-ops-lib && tsc --ignoreConfig --target ES2022 --module CommonJS --moduleResolution Node --types node --ignoreDeprecations 6.0 --esModuleInterop --skipLibCheck --outDir test-admin-ops-lib src/admin-operations-core.ts test/admin-operations-core.test.ts && node test-admin-ops-lib/test/admin-operations-core.test.js
scripts.test:analytics: rm -rf test-analytics-lib && tsc --ignoreConfig --target ES2022 --module CommonJS --moduleResolution Node --types node --ignoreDeprecations 6.0 --esModuleInterop --skipLibCheck --outDir test-analytics-lib src/analytics-core.ts test/analytics-core.test.ts && node test-analytics-lib/test/analytics-core.test.js

scripts.test:setup-wizard: rm -rf test-setup-wizard-lib && tsc --ignoreConfig --target ES2022 --module CommonJS --moduleResolution Node --types node --ignoreDeprecations 6.0 --esModuleInterop --skipLibCheck --outDir test-setup-wizard-lib src/setup-wizard-core.ts test/setup-wizard-core.test.ts && node test-setup-wizard-lib/test/setup-wizard-core.test.js
